summary.ko: 우기 한가운데, 매일 폭우와 높은 습도

ko: 비수기 할인을 활용할 수 있는 시기
en: Long sunshine hours make it great for outdoor activities
Off-season means fewer crowds and a more relaxed experience
Great time to take advantage of off-season discounts

ko: 월 30일 비가 와 야외 일정에 유의

en: Long sunshine hours make it great for outdoor activities
Comfortable temperatures
ja: 日照時間が長く、屋外活動に最適
快適な気温
zh: 日照时间充足，非常适合户外活动

ko: 월 24.2일 비가 와 야외 일정에 유의
en: Monthly rainfall of 152mm qualifies as rainy season
24.2 rainy days — outdoor plans need significant flexibility
Humidity at 84% makes it feel quite uncomfortable
ja: 月降水量152mmで雨季に相当
24.2日の雨日、屋外日程に注意が必要
湿度84%で不快指数が高い
zh: 月内约24.2天雨天，户外行程需充分灵活安排

en: Bring a folding umbrella or rain poncho
Bring sunglasses and a hat
ja: 折りたたみ傘またはレインコートを準備
サングラスと帽子を忘れずに

clothingAdvice.ko: 반팔, 얇은 긴바지. 자외선 차단 필수
clothingAdvice.en: Short sleeves and light long pants. UV protection essential
clothingAdvice.ja: 半袖と薄手の長ズボン。紫外線対策必須
clothingAdvice.zh: 短袖和薄长裤，防晒必不可少
